title: Chord Flow
summary: 32-pad chord collection browser and editor for Move Everything.

sections.title: Browser
items: Click: load preset and enter edit

sections.title: Edit
items: Pad presses select the active pad
Global Oct (default +2) sets preset-wide octave transpose
Global Trn sets preset-wide semitone transpose
Pad Oct sets per-pad octave transpose
Save row + Jog Right (or Click) writes a new preset
